Hello everyone, thanks for joining today's meeting. My name is John Smith, and I'll be leading this discussion about our Q2 strategy. First, let me introduce the team. We have Sarah Johnson from marketing, Mike Chen from engineering, and Karen Williams from operations. The main topics we'll cover today are product roadmap updates, customer feedback analysis, and resource planning for the next quarter.  Let's start with the product roadmap. Sarah, can you give us an overview of what we're planning for the next two months?
